name: Small Business Storefront
description: A fast, ready-to-publish online store with a product catalog, cart, and real Stripe checkout. Starts empty and walks you through adding YOUR real products and prices, then switches on payments with your own Stripe account — no invented products, no broken checkout.

integrations.description: Take real card payments through the owner's own Stripe account with hosted checkout
Send order receipts and answer customer enquiries from the owner's inbox
Ping Slack or Discord the moment a new order comes in
